game_info.title: Neon Brick Breaker
game_info.concept:
Relax your brain with the champion of time killer!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ballz/id1139609950

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Relax your brain with the champion of time killer!

Swipe your finger to throw the balls and break the bricks.
Try to break as many bricks as possible before they move down to the bottom. 
Collect all the items to get additional balls and make an endless ball chain!

The level of bricks will be increased after each round you throw the balls.
Very easy to play but very hard to reach high scores. Don't forget the angle is the key point!

Game Features:
◉ Free to play
◉ Endless gameplay
◉ Simple ball control
◉ Challenge your friends with the best highscore
game_info.description: Neon Brick Breaker is an addictive strategic arcade game where you launch a chain of glowing balls to break descending neon bricks. Each turn, you aim and fire your volley of balls. Bricks have durability numbers that decrease when hit; when a brick's health reaches zero, it shatters. Collect '+' orbs to permanently increase your ball count. If the bricks reach the bottom of the screen, the game ends. Plan your angles carefully to maximize damage and clear the board!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Aim the launcher
Space: Fire the ball chain
Arrow Up/Down: Fine-tune aiming precision
Z: Fast-forward (2x speed) while balls are moving
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from Game Over or Pause screens)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing the survival strategy by aiming for the lowest health bricks.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller scans the bottom-most row of bricks. It identifies the brick with the lowest health and calculates the angle required to hit it directly. It fires and waits for the turn to complete.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should progress through multiple rounds. The lowest health bricks should be destroyed consistently, preventing immediate defeat.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the "gap shot" strategy to maximize damage.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller looks for gaps in the brick layout or attempts to aim at the wall to bank shots into the upper rows. It randomizes the angle slightly within a "safe" cone to maximize bounces.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: High scores should be achieved as balls get trapped behind the top row of bricks, causing massive damage in a single turn.
